leadership.description: Our team brings experience from the world's largest technology companies. Every Braxen project is led by specialists who have shipped critical systems at scale.

members.name: Hugo Lemos
members.quote: I translate business problems into interfaces that work — every screen, every flow and every detail thought out for the end user and for operational results.

members.name: Neemias Rocha
members.quote: With ten years connecting sales strategy to execution, I understand the customer's pain before the first meeting and ensure measurable value from day one.

members.name: Rodrigo Gama
members.quote: I lead small teams in short cycles, focused on deliveries that hold real load without breaking on the second version.

members.name: Tiago Rocha
members.quote: I design agents and automations that create real value, and I keep the platform behind them reliable, observable and ready to scale.

metadata.title: Omnichannel AI Agents + Integrated CRM
metadata.description: AI agents on WhatsApp, Telegram, email and website chat. Integrated CRM, scheduling, sales and integration with your APIs. Proposal in 24h.
metadata.ogTitle: Omnichannel AI Agents + Integrated CRM — Braxen
metadata.ogDescription: AI agents that respond across every channel with integrated CRM. Scheduling, sales in the chat and integration with your APIs. Proposal in 24h.

hero.subtitle: AI agents with integrated CRM. 24/7 qualification, sales in the chat and integration with your APIs.

pains.title: Leads without a response
pains.desc: The customer sends a message at night and only hears back the next day — if at all.

pains.title: Fragmented channels
pains.desc: WhatsApp, email and website chat in different places. Nothing talks to each other.

pains.title: Zero visibility
pains.desc: You don't know how many leads came in, how many were served, how many became sales.

solutions.title: 24/7 service across all channels
solutions.desc: WhatsApp, Telegram, email, SMS and website chat — one agent, one queue, unified history.

solutions.title: CRM integrated with the operation
solutions.desc: Visual pipeline, automatic tags and conversion metrics. All in one place.

solutions.title: Sales, calendar and APIs connected
solutions.desc: Books meetings, sells in the chat and integrates ERP, payments or internal systems.

process.description: Rollout with operational support — monitoring, agent tuning and continuous evolution after going live.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.description: We map your service flow, active channels and required integrations. We understand volume, bottlenecks and what needs to be automated first.

steps.title: Agent training
steps.description: We configure the AI with your business knowledge — products, commercial rules, tone of voice and answers to the most common objections.

steps.title: Integration
steps.description: We connect WhatsApp, Telegram, email, website chat, CRM and external APIs. Everything working in the same operation.

steps.title: We go live
steps.description: In weeks — not months. We follow the first days, tune the agent and make sure the operation runs smoothly.

testimonials.description: Real results in customer service, CRM and automation.

items.q: How long does it take to go live?
items.a: The first version typically runs in 2 to 4 weeks, depending on channels and integrations. Leaner projects can go live in days.

items.q: Do I need to change my CRM?
items.a: Not necessarily. We integrate with the CRM you already use or deliver a CRM integrated with the operation — you choose what makes sense.

items.q: Does the agent integrate with my system (API)?
items.a: If it has an API, we connect. ERPs, payments, inventory, internal spreadsheets, legacy systems — we build the integration to fit.

items.q: What if I need a human or support after going live?
items.a: The agent transfers to a real agent when needed, with the full history in the CRM. Once it goes live, we can take care of ongoing operations — monitoring, tuning and agent evolution.
It depends on scope and channels. Every operation is different. Talk to us and we'll put together a technical proposal within 24 hours.

contact.description: Describe your operation. Reply within 24 hours with a technical analysis — no commitment.
contact.messagePlaceholder: e.g., I handle ~200 leads/month on WhatsApp and need to integrate with my ERP...

metadata.title: Tech Squads — Tailor-Made Technology Teams
metadata.description: Full engineering, product, data and AI squads integrated with your team. Senior professionals, active technical management and full flexibility. Build your squad with Braxen.
metadata.ogTitle: Tech Squads — Tailor-Made Technology Teams — Braxen
metadata.ogDescription: Engineering, product, data and AI squads integrated with your team. Without inflating headcount or waiting months for recruitment.

hero.subtitle: Full engineering, product, data and AI squads integrated with your team. Without inflating headcount or waiting months for recruitment.
hero.trustLine: Proposal in 24h · squad running in weeks

items.label: of G2000 companies use external tech teams

stats.sources: Sources: Coherent Market Insights, 2026 · Saigon Technology · Gartner

items.title: Hiring takes months
items.desc: 57% of managers find it hard to find qualified IT professionals. Meanwhile, the backlog grows.

items.title: Overloaded internal team
items.desc: Your team fights fires instead of building product. Every new project is one more plate spinning.

items.title: Lack of specialists
items.desc: AI, cloud, DevOps, mobile — you need profiles that don't exist on your current team.

items.title: Projects slipping
items.desc: Without delivery capacity, roadmaps slide and competitors get ahead.

items.title: High turnover
items.desc: Developers leave and take knowledge with them. Rehiring costs time and money.

items.title: Scaling is risky
items.desc: Hiring full-time for seasonal demand is expensive. Not hiring means missing opportunities.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.desc: We understand your context, stack, processes and goals. We map the ideal profiles for your challenge.

steps.title: Squad assembly
steps.desc: We pick senior professionals with proven experience. You approve every profile before starting.

steps.title: Integration
steps.desc: The squad connects with your team, tools and rituals. It works as a natural extension of your team.

steps.title: Management and evolution
steps.desc: Ongoing metrics, feedback and continuous improvement. Scale up or down whenever you need.

differentials.subtitle: We don't just deliver people. We deliver real delivery capacity, with management and continuity.

items.title: Senior professionals
items.desc: We don't allocate juniors in disguise. Every squad member has real experience on complex projects.

items.title: Active technical management
items.desc: A tech lead tracks deliveries, code quality, architecture and team growth.

items.title: Real integration
items.desc: The squad joins your dailies, sprints and decisions. It's not a vendor — it's part of the team.

items.title: Low turnover
items.desc: A retention model that preserves project knowledge. Stability is part of the delivery.

items.title: AI-native
items.desc: Every squad already operates with AI tools to speed up development, review and testing.

items.title: Full flexibility
items.desc: Grow or shrink the squad as demand changes. No red tape, no penalties, no surprises.

marketContext.description: Leading companies already understand: building delivery capacity with specialized external teams isn't outsourcing — it's strategy. The model has evolved from cost cutting to generating real value, with AI, cloud and DevOps integrated from the start.
marketContext.source: Source: Coherent Market Insights, IT Services Outsourcing Market 2026–2033

items.a: We usually start with 2 to 3 people, but a squad can have any configuration. We tailor it to your context.

items.q: How long does it take to build the squad?
items.a: From 1 to 3 weeks, depending on the required profiles. More specialized professionals may take a bit longer.

items.q: Does the squad use my tools or bring its own?
items.a: The squad adapts to your stack, tools and processes. We operate as an extension of your team, not a separate silo.
Monthly contract, no long-term lock-in. You can scale up or down according to project demand.
Each squad has a Braxen tech lead who tracks deliveries, code quality and team growth. You receive periodic reports.

items.q: What if a professional doesn't perform?
items.a: We replace them quickly without impacting the project. Our active management model catches problems before they affect delivery.

items.q: What time zone do you work in?
items.a: Brazil, with flexibility to align with your hours. We work remotely with efficient async communication and sync rituals when needed.

contact.description: Describe your technical challenge. We reply within 24 hours with a tailor-made squad proposal.

integrations.description: Calendar, messaging, payments and APIs — we plug into the agent's flow without rebuilding your operation.

1.title: Customer Service Agent
1.description: Omnichannel service with automatic qualification, 24/7 answers and human handoff when needed. Up to 80% reduction in repetitive calls.

2.title: Lead Qualification
2.description: Smart triage in the chat with generative AI scoring. Your sales team only sees opportunities ready to move forward.

3.title: Custom CRM
3.description: Sales pipeline designed for your process — integrated with WhatsApp, email and external APIs. No generic license nobody uses.

4.title: Operational Dashboard
4.description: Team, revenue and operations metrics in real time. Visibility into what matters to decide fast and scale with control.

5.title: Internal ERP
5.description: Inventory, procurement and billing control connected to the rest of the operation. Software built for your workflow, not a template.

6.title: WhatsApp Automation
6.description: Automated onboarding, follow-up and notification flows in the channel your customer already uses. Integration with payments, calendar and CRM.
